title: Moses App Catalog Version Entry
description: Schema for entries in manifest.versions[] and for the per-version files under apps/<slug>/versions/<version>.yaml.

version.description: Semantic version (https://semver.org). Pre-release and build metadata permitted.

imageDigest.description: OCI image digest. Digests only; tags are rejected because tags are mutable.

imageRef.description: Optional human-friendly image reference (e.g. ghcr.io/org/app). Digest is the source of truth.

appConfigURL.description: HTTPS URL to the moses-app.config.json for this version.

appConfigSHA256.description: Expected SHA-256 of the file at appConfigURL. Verified in CI at merge and by Moses instances on sync.

mosesMinVersion.description: Minimum Moses platform version this app requires (semver).

releaseNotes.description: Freeform release notes, Markdown permitted. Keep under 4 KB.

releasedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the release. Must be in the past.

yanked.description: Set to true to mark this version as withdrawn. Moses instances will stop serving it for new installs.
